sources.title: Sources to scrape
sources.description: Select which event platforms to scrape. Leave all checked to scrape all 6.

query.title: Keyword search
query.description: Search query passed to each source's search endpoint.

location.title: Location filter
location.description: Filter by city/country or by lat/lng/radiusKm. Use one approach, not both.

dateFrom.title: From date
dateFrom.description: Include only events starting on or after this date (YYYY-MM-DD).

dateTo.title: To date
dateTo.description: Include only events starting on or before this date (YYYY-MM-DD).

eventTypes.title: Event types
eventTypes.description: Only include events of these types. Leave empty for all types.

industries.title: Industries
industries.description: Filter by industry keywords matched against event description and tags.

format.title: Event format
format.description: Filter by online, in-person, or return both.

priceType.title: Price type
priceType.description: Filter by free, paid, or return both.

language.title: Language
language.description: ISO 639-1 language code (e.g. en, es, fr). Leave empty for all languages.

maxResults.title: Max total results
maxResults.description: Hard cap on total events returned across all sources.

maxResultsPerSource.title: Max results per source
maxResultsPerSource.description: Cap per platform to prevent one source dominating results.
